results.engine_gap: leaves-the-battlefield trigger with once-per-turn limit and token creation

Already returns make_static_pt_boost; no empty effect_fn.

Both ETB and Shrine ETB trigger require land-tutoring.
Already returns make_keyword_grant for indestructible; no empty effect_fn.
Trample-grant static is wired; ETB earthbend remains a gap.
Already uses placeholder static +2/+2 boost.
ETB now opens create_target_choice for the optional exile.
Both modes outside engine support.
ETB now opens create_target_choice on opponent permanents with MV>=3.
Equipment auto-attach also gap.

Aura system not modeled.
